nodes.name: 01 Chat Trigger - Frontend or n8n Chat

parameters.toolDescription: Search approved ITsNomatata internal documents, policies, uploaded files, project summaries, and GraphRAG knowledge. Check role/department scope before using content. Return concise relevant summaries only.
Look up approved team members, departments, roles, responsibilities, managers, and active status from Supabase. Never invent people.
Research external companies using Tavily Search API. Prefer official websites and reliable sources. Return title, description, services, contacts, social links, images, and source URLs.
Fetch company-related images from official websites: og:image, logo, favicon, hero images, gallery images, product images. Return source URLs and avoid random unsourced images.
Analyze an uploaded image using OpenAI vision. Use this when the user sends a picture and asks what it is, what car/model/object appears, to read text from an image, or to extract visible details.

parameters.name: input
parameters.value: ={{ [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'input_text', text: $fromAI('image_question', 'Analyze this image. Identify visible objects, text, brand/model clues, and important details. Be honest about uncertainty.', 'string') }, { type: 'input_image', image_url: $fromAI('image_url', ($json.attachments || []).find(a => a?.url && !String(a.url).startsWith('['))?.url || '', 'string') }] }] }}

parameters.toolDescription: Generate a downloadable PDF from an AI answer, document summary, report, or HTML. Return attachment object with type pdf, url, and download_url. Use only when CODEX_FILE_SERVICE_URL and CODEX_FILE_SERVICE_KEY are configured.

Create downloadable txt, md, json, csv, or html files from Codex output. Return attachment object with type, name, url, and download_url. Use only when CODEX_FILE_SERVICE_URL and CODEX_FILE_SERVICE_KEY are configured.

options.systemMessage: You are Codex, the internal AI assistant for ITsNomatata. Answer clearly and safely. Use tools only when needed. Respect role, department, organization, and project memory scope. Never expose restricted company data. If verified internal knowledge is missing, say so clearly. Do not process huge raw files or base64 data in chat; ask the user to upload the file through document training.
